rationale: The two papers have strong conceptual overlap: the 2023 paper studies goal progress perceptions and motivation in goal pursuit, while the 2011 JMR paper develops a theory of perceived progress velocity and its motivational consequences. Given the citing note explicitly frames itself as extending prior work on goal progress perceptions, this cited article is plausibly a theory/foundation source rather than an incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
